Achievements.Title: Come on Down to South Park
Achievements.Description: Watch the whole intro theme song
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Gentlemen, Start Your Profanity
Achievements.Description: Win the Rally Days #1 race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Trophy Transporter
Achievements.Description: Win the Rally Days #2 race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Moo?
Achievements.Description: Win the Cow Days race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Be My Big Gay Al-Entine
Achievements.Description: Win the Valentine's Day race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Give Me Back My Undies!
Achievements.Description: Win the Spring Cleaning race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Reading Is for Nerds
Achievements.Description: Win the Read a Book Day race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Jesus, Take the Wheel
Achievements.Description: Win the Easter Egg Hunt race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: When Life Gives You Lemons, Ram Into Someone
Achievements.Description: Win the Pink Lemonade race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: You're Breakin' My Balls Here, Officer!
Achievements.Description: Win the Memorial Day race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: This Is America, Bro
Achievements.Description: Win the Independence Day race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: I'm Not Fat, I'm Big-Boned!
Achievements.Description: Win the Halloween Rally race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: That Turkey's Pissed Off!
Achievements.Description: Win the Thanksgiving race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Howdy-Ho!
Achievements.Description: Win the Christmas Day race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: We're Gonna Have to Blame Canada
Achievements.Description: Win the Millennium New Year's Eve race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: If You Cheat and Succeed, You're Savvy
Achievements.Description: Unlock the Cheat Sheet by winning the race without ever touching an item box; you can use Terrance Turbos
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: I Said HOW WOULD YOU LIKE TO SUCK MY BALLS, Mr Garrison
Achievements.Description: Unlock Mr. Garrison by being the only player to pass over each checkpoint with the trophy in Rally Days #2
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Lunchy Munchies, Hmmm?
Achievements.Description: Unlock Pip by passing over only Checkpoints 1 and 4 with the trophy in Rally Days #2
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Did You SEE These Shoes, Wendy!?
Achievements.Description: Unlock Bebe by losing without touching the cure in Cow Days
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: SCOTLAND FOREVER!
Achievements.Description: Unlock the extra skins for The Boys and Chef by collecting all 3 Golden Cows in the Valentine's Day race
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Oh Man, This Is Way Too Much Pressure!
Achievements.Description: Unlock Tweek by using 5 caffeine boosts from the blue power up boxes in the Spring Cleaning race
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Respect Mah Authoritah!
Achievements.Description: Unlock Cartman Cop by hitting Chicken Lover's bus 5 times with Salty Balls in the Read a Book Day race
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: I Am Skuzzlebutt! Lord of the Mountains!
Achievements.Description: Unlock Skuzzlebutt by collecting the Golden Cow during the Easter race
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Weeeeeell Kyle's Mom's a Bitch, She's a Big Fat Bitch
Achievements.Description: Unlock Mrs. Broflovski by collecting the Pie during the Easter Race
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Mom, More Cheesy Poofs, Less Talking!
Achievements.Description: Unlock Ms. Cartman by being the only player to deliver lemonade during the Pink Lemonade race
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Don't Kick the Baby!
Achievements.Description: Unlock Ike by collecting the Golden Cow on the plane wing during the Memorial Day race
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Moo
Achievements.Description: Unlock Visitor by collecting both Pies during the Memorial Day race
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: I Don't Think Eight Year Old Kids Drink Beer, Mmm
Achievements.Description: Unlock Ned by winning after using 12 Caffeine Boosts or Terrance Boosts during the Independence Day race
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: You Killed Kenny! You Bastard!
Achievements.Description: Unlock Death by winning while only delivering 4 Candies at once during the Halloween race
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: No Starvin' Marvin, That's My Pot Pie!
Achievements.Description: Unlock Marvin by losing without collecting any turkeys during the Thanksgiving race
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Rectus... Dominus... Cheesy Poofs...
Achievements.Description: Unlock Damien by winning without letting another player pick up the key during the Millenium New Years Eve race
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: But We're Not Gay Phillip... We're Not?
Achievements.Description: Unlock Terrance & Phillip by collecting all 4 Golden Cows during the Christmas race
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Hey, a Quarter!
Achievements.Description: Collect the Extra Credit during the Rally Days #1 race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Hey, Another Quarter!
Achievements.Description: Collect the Extra Credit during the Rally Days #2 race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: This Quarter Stinks...
Achievements.Description: Collect the Extra Credit during the Cow Days race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: A Penny for My Valentine
Achievements.Description: Collect the Extra Credit during the Valentine's Day race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: I Found This in My Laundry
Achievements.Description: Collect the Extra Credit during the Spring Cleaning race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: I Read a Book and It Said to Search Toll Bridges for Quarters
Achievements.Description: Collect the Extra Credit during the Read a Book Day race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Usually It's Candy in the Easter Eggs
Achievements.Description: Collect the Extra Credit during the Easter Egg Hunt race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: I Said a Lime, Not a Dime
Achievements.Description: Collect the Extra Credit during the Pink Lemonade race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Laser-Cut Quarter
Achievements.Description: Collect the Extra Credit during the Memorial Day race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: You Have the Right to Press Pennies
Achievements.Description: Collect the Extra Credit during the Independence Day race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: What a Treat!
Achievements.Description: Collect the Extra Credit during the Halloween Rally race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Hey! That Turkey Gobbled My Change!
Achievements.Description: Collect the Extra Credit during the Thanksgiving race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Last Christmas, I Gave You My Coins
Achievements.Description: Collect the Extra Credit during the Christmas Day race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: I Saw the Millennium Change and All I Got Was This Lousy Quarter
Achievements.Description: Collect the Extra Credit during the Millenium New Year's Eve race in Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Still Think the Rides Are Rigged?
Achievements.Description: Win the race at the Carnival in Mini Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Big City Dreams
Achievements.Description: Win the race in the City in Mini Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: This Place Hasn't Got Shit on Tegridy Farms
Achievements.Description: Win the race on the Farm in Mini Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Big Gay Al's Big Gay Mini Championship
Achievements.Description: Win the race at Big Gay Al's in Mini Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: You Kids Better Wash Your Hands
Achievements.Description: Win the race in the Sewer in Mini Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Go, Woodland Critter, Go!
Achievements.Description: Win the race in the Forest in Mini Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: We're Huntin' for First Place!
Achievements.Description: Win the race on the Mountain in Mini Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: We Survived, Dude!
Achievements.Description: Win the race in the Volcano in Mini Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Now This Is Rigged
Achievements.Description: Beat PS2Hagrid's time of 02:06.72 in the Carnival in Mini Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: City-Wide Fame if You Beat This
Achievements.Description: Beat PS2Hagrid's time of 02:48.58 in the City in Mini Championship mode
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Farming Dev Points from This Set
Achievements.Description: Beat PS2Hagrid's time of 01:22.08 on the Farm in Mini Championship mode

Achievements.Title: Super Complicated Sewer Stuff
Achievements.Description: With the Random Checkpoints and Pick Ups options enabled as well as 5 random CPUs, win the Rally Days #2 race in the Sewer on Arcade mode with the map turned off before the countdown finishes and kept off for the entire race
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Mom Said It's MY Turn with the Laser
Achievements.Description: Win the Memorial Day race while being the only player to pass over all 4 checkpoints with the laser
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid

Achievements.Title: Magical Mystery Tour
Achievements.Description: Win the Championship without restarting after Rally Days #1 while playing as the Mystery character after unlocking every character. The icon will appear in the bottom right if you have everyone when you load into the race.
Achievements.Author: PS2Hagrid
